scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/lib/pageon-ionic-viewer && cp src/lib/pageon-ionic-viewer/pageon-ionic-viewer.component.html dist/lib/pageon-ionic-viewer/pageon-ionic-viewer.component.html && cp src/lib/pageon-ionic-viewer/pageon-ionic-viewer.component.scss dist/lib/pageon-ionic-viewer/pageon-ionic-viewer.component.scss && cp README.md dist/README.md && cp package.json dist/package.json
